title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
